title: Italian-Style Crispy Bruschetta
description: A classic Italian appetizer or snack featuring crispy bread topped with diced tomatoes, garlic, and basil.
instructions: 2. Slice the crispy bread into 1-inch thick slices.
3. Place the bread slices on a baking sheet and toast for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
4. While the bread is toasting, combine diced tomatoes, garlic, and basil in a bowl.
5. Once the bread is toasted, let it cool for a minute.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the toasted bread and top with the tomato mixture.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
